message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Scheduled Events

actor "Recording Staff" as RS
actor "Coach" as Coach
participant "IP/Mobile Cams" as Cams
participant "Consumer Apps" as CA
participant "Security Gateway" as SG
entity "Control Domain\n(win10/linux)" as CD
participant "Streaming Service\n(encoder)" as SS
entity "Media\n(mediaID)" as Media
participant "Transfer Service" as TS

Coach -> SG : authenticate(ID)
SG --> Coach : return(token)

CD -> SS : host(sources{endpoints})

Cams -> CD : register(endpoint)
CA -> CD : register(token, priority)

RS -> CD : createEvent(configuration{description, sources, consumers{priorities}})

CD -> SS : create(newEvent)

RS -> CD : start(newEvent)
CD -> SS : encode()
CD --> CA : notify(recording)

RS -> CD : stop(newEvent)
CD -> SS : saveAs(mediaID)
SS -> Media : save(mediaID)

CD -> TS : host(mediaID, consumers{token, priority})

CD --> CA : notify(newMediaAvailable, mediaID, transferServiceEndpoint)

alt auto-download enabled
    CA -> TS : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
    TS --> CA : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
else manual-download enabled
    Coach -> CA : showMedia(token)
    CA -> TS : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
    TS --> CA : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
end

@enduml
```
